## Checklist:

- [ ] Assign Reviewers, Assignees, and Labels
- [ ] Set [PR draft](https://github.blog/2019-02-14-introducing-draft-pull-requests/)if it's not ready

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛: Bugfix
- [ ] ✨: Feature
- [ ] 💻: Code style update (formatting, local variables)
- [ ] ♻️: Refactoring (no functional changes, no api changes)
- [ ] 📝: Documentation content changes
- [ ] 📊: EDA / exploratory analysis
- [ ] 🧹: Data cleaning / preprocessing
- [ ] 🧪: Feature engineering
- [ ] 🧠: Model training / new model
- [ ] 🎛️: Hyperparameter tuning / optimization
- [ ] 🧩: Ensembling / stacking / blending
- [ ] ✅: Validation / CV / evaluation changes
- [ ] 🏁: Submission / score improvement
- [ ] 🧱: Notebook refactor / reorganization
- [ ] 🛠️: Other... Please describe:
